helpful: The snapshot supplied the exact official petition URL and conference posture.
Local rendering recovered the complete scanned petition when text extraction failed.
The statpack supplied calibrated paid-petition and circuit base rates.
CourtListener confirmed the lower-court docket and order date without exposing an outcome.
gaps: Built-in OCR for scanned provisioned filings would avoid a manual PDF-rendering path.
Corpus similarity filters for petition fee class, response status, representation, relists, and CVSG would produce more relevant priors.
notes: The broad corpus query was transfer-heavy and returned recent but weakly comparable SCOTUS matters. Structured statpack cuts and the recovered petition were more useful.
